alphafold.description: AlphaFold structure prediction database - 200M+ protein structures

arxiv.description: arXiv paper search and metadata - disabled in Railway until a lightweight packaging path replaces mcp-simple-arxiv

uniprot.description: UniProt protein database - 250M+ sequences, 25 specialized tools

pubmed.description: PubMed biomedical literature - 35M+ articles, full-text access

chembl.description: ChEMBL drug discovery database - 2.4M compounds, 16M bioactivity measurements, 27 tools

pubchem.description: PubChem chemical database - 110M+ compounds, safety/toxicity data, 30 tools

pdb.description: Protein Data Bank - 200K+ 3D structures, validation metrics, 5 tools + 6 resources

biorxiv.description: bioRxiv preprint server - biology preprints, latest research (non-peer-reviewed), 3 tools

semantic_scholar.description: Semantic Scholar - 12 tools for AI-powered literature discovery, citations, author profiles, paper recommendations

string_db.description: STRING-DB - 6 tools for protein interaction networks, functional enrichment, homolog search

kegg.description: KEGG - 33 tools for pathway analysis, gene/compound research, drug interactions, 500K+ pathways, 5K+ organisms

opentargets.description: OpenTargets - 6 tools for gene-drug-disease associations, 60K+ targets, 25K+ diseases, 20+ integrated databases

reactome.description: Reactome - 8 tools for pathway curation, reaction networks, protein interactions, 25K+ reactions, 2.5K+ pathways

ensembl.description: Ensembl - 25 tools for genome annotation, cross-species genomics, variant analysis, multi-species support

geneontology.description: Gene Ontology - 4 tools for functional annotation, GO term search, ontology navigation, gene annotations

proteinatlas.description: Protein Atlas - 14 tools for tissue expression, subcellular localization, pathology data, blood/brain atlases

bioontology.description: BioOntology - 10 tools for ontology search, text annotation, semantic analysis, 1200+ biological ontologies

dlm_literature.description: DLM Literature & Biological Context - IN-PROCESS (zero latency), 9 tools: entity extraction (use_master_vocab), multi-source literature search, relation extraction (polarity+certainty), NeSy document encoding, entity mapping (MONDO+DrugBank), LMP context

_comment: Native MICA MCP tools will be added in Phase 2

smic_tools.description: Graph analysis and cavity detection tools (SMIC)

literature.description: PubMed, arXiv, and scientific literature search
